final:
module pipo_shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [4:0] parallel_in,
    output reg [4:0] parallel_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        parallel_out <= 5'b00000;
    end else begin
        parallel_out <= parallel_in;
    end
end

endmodule
